-- 1 of 10 --

• Called “invisible” because only you can see
how many there are.
• People who are engaging with your ads.
• Almost as valuable as an email list.
• Easy to “indoctrinate”.
• People who are most likely to buy.
• You’re building yours ALREADY!
THE INVISIBLE LIST
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

• Well, obviously if they watch a video …
• Click on the ad.
• Click the link in the ad.
• Visit any page with your pixel on it.
• Comment.
• React.
• Forward.
• Visit your FB or IG page.
• Oh hell this list is getting too long, let me show you.
